title: Team leader/Nurse substitute
salary_range: Salary and terms of employment are determined b
meta_description: Join Attendo Oy as a Team Leader/Nurse Substitute in Oulu! A key support role leading care operations and developing working methods while ensuring smooth care.
description: We are looking for a team leader-nurse to replace Attendo Kellokkaas in Oulu. As a key support, you will lead and develop the working methods of the community while ensuring smooth care operations. With your education in the social and health field (nursing) and experience managing personnel and teamwork in social and health services, you bring a genuine interest in working with disabled individuals, a solution-oriented approach, persistence, and ability to motivate the team. Our flexible work schedule allows for easy integration into your life while providing opportunities for professional development and comprehensive occupational health care benefits. Apply by April 30, 2026, or contact Liisa Räihä at liisa.raiha@attendo.fi for more information about the position.
what_we_expect: Education in the social and health field: nurse
Experience in managing personnel and teamwork in social and health services
Criminal record extract or readiness to obtain it
Genuine interest in working with disabled people, a solution-oriented approach, persistence, ability to support and motivate the team
job_responsibilities: Lead and support the staff in their daily work and ensure the smoothness of care
Develop working methods, working atmosphere, and training needs with the team
Team leader/Nurse substitute Attendo Kellokkaas Oulu We are looking for a team leader-nurse to replace Attendo Kellokkaas in Oulu.
what_we_offer: Edenred benefit in accordance with the practice defined by the employer
Employee benefits program and discounts from several service providers
Training opportunities and support for skill development
search_keywords: team leader nurse substitute, team leader nursing position, Oulu job opening, Attendo Kellokas, leadership role, social services, disability management, employee benefits, career advancement, flexible work schedule

title: Nurse

meta_description: Glow Union Oy is seeking a versatile nurse for their private healthcare unit in Jyväskylä, specializing in aesthetic treatments and medical services since 2012.
description: Glow Union Oy is seeking a versatile nurse for their private healthcare unit in Jyväskylä, specializing in aesthetic treatments and medical services since 2012. The ideal candidate will provide expert care, diagnose treatment needs, implement scientific decision-making, advise on healthy lifestyles, and evaluate medical care. They should have experience or strong interest in aesthetic treatments, excellent customer service skills, initiative, responsibility, flexibility, and an entrepreneurial attitude. Offered are a versatile job description, opportunities to develop in the field of aesthetics, and work in an expert and customer-oriented environment.
what_we_expect: Experience in aesthetic treatments or strong interest in the field
Excellent customer service and interaction skills
Interest in the aesthetic field, entrepreneurial attitude, understanding of customer-oriented service work
job_responsibilities: Working at a specialist doctor's office and assisting with minor procedures
Customer service, flexible approach to work, desire to develop one's own skills
what_we_offer: Opportunity to develop in aesthetic treatments

description: Kuljetus A & N Parkkinen Oy is seeking a skilled Lumber truck driver for permanent employment in Kemijärvi, Finland. This position involves driving heavy vehicles to various stations including Kemijärvi, Kuusamo, Rovaniemi, and Sweden. The successful candidate will be responsible for freight transport duties and must have experience operating control heavy vehicles and using communication devices. For more information or to apply, please contact Niko at 040 548 3949.

meta_description: Join OPTI CLEANING SERVICES OY/Mäntsälä as a dedicated grocery store cleaner for the summer months in Mäntsälä! Strong communication skills and ability to work
description: OPTI CLEANING SERVICES OY/Mäntsälä is seeking a dedicated grocery store cleaner for the summer months in Mäntsälä. This role involves maintaining cleaning equipment, washing floors and surfaces, food cleaning, washing dishes, handling chemical cleaners, maintaining stocks of cleaning supplies, and cleaning toilets. The ideal candidate should have strong communication skills and be able to work independently as part of a team. For more information or to apply, please contact henkilosto@opticleaning.net.

title: Animal Clinic Cleaner
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements and other company and links
meta_description: OPTI CLEANING SERVICES OY/Jyväskylä seeks a dedicated Animal Clinic Cleaner for full-time summer employment. Ensure cleanliness in the facility with equipment
description: We are looking for a dedicated Animal Clinic Cleaner at OPTI CLEANING SERVICES OY/Jyväskylä. This full-time position offers summer employment in the facility, where you will maintain cleaning equipment, clean glass surfaces, handle chemical cleaners, and ensure that all areas of the clinic are thoroughly cleaned. You'll also be responsible for maintaining stocks of cleaning supplies and handling tasks such as cleaning up, cleaning surfaces, and cleaning toilets. With a strong background in animal clinics or a similar setting, this is an opportunity to contribute to a clean and hygienic environment while gaining valuable experience. If you're fluent in Finnish and English, we welcome your application today!
job_responsibilities: Washing and cleaning floors and surfaces.
Application title: Summer job, animal clinic cleaner
